input: Meeting output: Launch the new feature pending legal review. Launch owner: Sarah. Target date: June 1. Condition: legal must approve terms of service changes. No one named to verify legal approval.
output_rubric: Must classify as UNRESOLVED or CONDITIONAL with a warning. Must identify that the condition lacks a verifier — who will check that legal approval is obtained? Must apply Condition Specificity Test.
evidence: Conditional-with-missing-verifier case. Condition is present but verification ownership is absent.
